underlying_goal: Generate and validate executable phase plans for Phase 43 of their project roadmap, then critically analyze and fix gaps in those plans
friction_detail: Signal command wrote to global ~/.gsd/knowledge/ instead of project-local .planning/knowledge/ due to hardcoded paths in the command spec.
brief_summary: User generated Phase 43 plans, requested deep critical analysis revealing producer-consumer gaps, then had Claude fix both the plans and a KB routing bug discovered during signal capture.
